underlying_goal: Fix EDK word boundary classifier and hyperscan engine boundary logic for character mismatches, regenerate oracle HPP files, create a commit description, and fix a clang-tidy lint error
friction_detail: Comment length caused clang-format to break the line, triggering a clang-tidy braces-around-statements error that required a follow-up fix.
brief_summary: User needed fixes to EDK word boundary classifier and hyperscan engine, oracle HPP regeneration, a commit message, and a lint fix — all were successfully completed.
